description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine ascc_2, and is implemented by a call to ascc_2. This API no longer performs any action. Usage in previous releases described below. Use this API routine to calculate three phase and line-to-ground fault solutions. Results may be programmatically accessed via the internally accessible fetch routines SCGTXT, SCGBUS, SCGBRN, and SCG3WN. Usage is: - invoke SCGR API with APIOPT = 0; - multiple calls to fetch routines; - optionally, repeat of above steps for different fault and/or different pre-fault conditions; - final invocation of SCGR API with APIOPT = 1. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = scgr(sid, all, apiopt, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation of scgrapi. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying fault and options. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: apply fault calculations and fill arrays used by fetch routines.
deallocate arrays used by fetch routines.

status.description: L-G fault (ignored if STATUS(1) is 0) (0 by default).
bus number of the subsystem bus to be faulted.
double-precision fault calculation option (ignored, but must be specified as 0 or 1; 0 by default; double precision always used).
dc line and FACTS device option (ignored if STATUS(4) is 1) (0 by default).
transformer impedance correction option (ignored if STATUS(1) is 0 or STATUS(4) is 1 (1 by default).
do not apply to zero sequence.

error_codes.description: SCGR is obsolete; use “Fault>Automatic sequencing fault calculation (ASCC)..” (API routine ASCC_2).
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
